parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ inputs: [{ file_url: $('Validate Input').item.json.image_url, options: [{ option: '-loop', argument: '1' }, { option: '-t', argument: String(Math.round($('Validate Input').item.json.duration)) }] }], filters: [{ filter: $('Build FFmpeg Filter').item.json.filter }], outputs: [{ options: [{ option: '-map', argument: '[v]' }, { option: '-c:v', argument: 'libx264' }, { option: '-pix_fmt', argument: 'yuv420p' }, { option: '-t', argument: String(Math.round($('Validate Input').item.json.duration)) }] }], id: $('Validate Input').item.json.shot_id }) }}
